abstract: Returns the unique identifier of the opaque type to which a trusted app instance belongs.
overview:
## Return Value

A value that identifies the opaque type of a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustedApplication] object.

## Discussion

This function returns a value that uniquely identifies the opaque type of a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustedApplication] instance. You can compare this value to the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFTypeID] identifier obtained by calling the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFGetTypeID(_:)] method on a specific instance. These values might change from release to release or platform to platform.

# SecTrustedApplicationGetTypeID()

**Function**

Returns the unique identifier of the opaque type to which a trusted app instance belongs.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecTrustedApplicationGetTypeID() -> CFTypeID
```

## Return Value

A value that identifies the opaque type of a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustedApplication] object.

## Discussion

This function returns a value that uniquely identifies the opaque type of a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustedApplication] instance. You can compare this value to the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFTypeID] identifier obtained by calling the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFGetTypeID(_:)] method on a specific instance. These values might change from release to release or platform to platform.
title: SecTrustedApplicationGetTypeID()
